children.heading: Priority for insurance for certain residential and church properties and business concerns
children.label: a Priority for insurance for certain residential and church properties and business concerns
children.text: In carrying out the flood insurance program the Administrator shall afford a priority to making flood insurance available to cover residential properties which are designed for the occupancy of from one to four families, church properties, and business properties which are owned or leased and operated by small business concerns.

children.heading: Availability of insurance for other properties
children.label: b Availability of insurance for other properties

children.text: studies and investigations undertaken and carried out and information received or exchanged under , andsection 4014 of this title
such other information as may be necessary,

children.label: A
children.text: other residential properties not described in subsection (a) or (d),

children.label: D
children.text: properties occupied by private nonprofit organizations, and

children.label: E
children.text: properties owned by State and local governments and agencies thereof,

children.heading: Availability of insurance in States or areas evidencing positive interest in securing insurance and assuring adoption of adequate land use and control measures
children.label: c Availability of insurance in States or areas evidencing positive interest in securing insurance and assuring adoption of adequate land use and control measures

children.text: evidenced a positive interest in securing flood insurance coverage under the flood insurance program, and

given satisfactory assurance that by , adequate land use and control measures will have been adopted for the State or area (or subdivision) which are consistent with the comprehensive criteria for land management and use developed under , and that the application and enforcement of such measures will commence as soon as technical information on floodways and on controlling flood elevations is available.December 31, 1971section 4102 of this title

children.heading: Availability of insurance for multifamily properties
children.label: d Availability of insurance for multifamily properties

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: The Administrator shall make flood insurance available to cover residential properties of 5 or more residences. Notwithstanding any other provision of law, the maximum coverage amount that the Administrator may make available under this subsection to such residential properties shall be equal to the coverage amount made available to commercial properties.

children.heading: Rule of construction
children.label: 2 Rule of construction
children.text: Nothing in this subsection shall be construed to limit the ability of individuals residing in residential properties of 5 or more residences to obtain insurance for the contents and personal articles located in such residences.
